project.name: Deep Audit Round 3 - Edge Functions, Hooks, Auth & UI Fixes

stories.title: Fix PendingApprovalPage crash - logout is not a function
stories.description: PendingApprovalPage.tsx line 25 destructures { logout } from useAuth(), but AuthContext only exports signOut. This crashes when user clicks logout. Fix: rename logout to signOut.

stories.title: Fix missing checkCreditBalance import in extract-action-items
stories.description: extract-action-items/index.ts calls checkCreditBalance on line 126 but never imports it. Runtime crash (ReferenceError). Add import from _shared/costTracking.ts.

stories.title: Fix XSS in fathom-oauth-callback error HTML
stories.description: fathom-oauth-callback injects unescaped error/errorDescription from URL params directly into HTML. XSS vulnerability. Fix: HTML-encode all user input before embedding in HTML responses.

stories.title: Fix fireflies-sync wrong table name organization_members
stories.description: fireflies-sync line 418 queries 'organization_members' but the actual table is 'organization_memberships'. Meetings sync without org context.

stories.title: Remove env var exposure from fathom-oauth-callback error response
stories.description: fathom-oauth-callback lines 395-402 expose env var presence and FATHOM_REDIRECT_URI value in error responses. Information disclosure. Fix: remove debug block or restrict to dev.

stories.title: Fix DealCard and ContactCard charCodeAt crash on empty name
stories.description: DealCard.tsx line 78 and ContactCard.tsx line 108 call charCodeAt(0) on name without null/empty check. Crashes with NaN if name is empty. Also DealCard line 144 calls .split() on deal.name without null check.

stories.title: Fix useFathomIntegration OAuth listener cleanup
stories.description: useFathomIntegration.ts adds message event listener and poll interval but only cleans up on popup close or timeout - not on component unmount. Memory leak if user navigates away during OAuth.

stories.title: Fix Pipeline drag-drop undefined array access
stories.description: Pipeline.tsx line 338 and 415 access localDealsByStage[toStage] without null check. If toStage is undefined (findStageForId returns undefined during drag race conditions), this crashes.
